expectations.evidence: All indentation uses tab characters throughout the file

expectations.text: Type hints on ALL function signatures
expectations.evidence: Every function has typed params and return: e.g. func take_damage(amount: int, from_position: Vector2) -> void, func _process_idle(_delta: float) -> void
signals (L5-6) > enums (L8-9) > constants (L11) > exports (L13-29) > vars (L31-36) > onready (L38-40) > _ready (L43) > _physics_process (L49) > public (L79) > private (L105+)
@onready var sprite: Sprite2D = $Sprite2D, @onready var hurtbox: Area2D = $HurtBox, @onready var collision_shape
_physics_process dispatches to state handlers, _process_move uses Input.get_vector + velocity + move_and_slide

expectations.text: Incoming damage uses BOTH area_entered AND overlap polling

expectations.evidence: await only in _spawn_sword_hitbox (L186), which is called from _start_attack, not from _physics_process
